name: Platzer Fastigheter Holding AB (publ)
summary: Platzer Fastigheter Holding AB (publ) operates as a commercial real estate company in Sweden. It owns, develops, and manages commercial properties, which primarily include offices, warehousing and logistics facilities, and shops. As of December 31, 2019, its property portfolio comprised 68 properties with a total lettable area of 824,337 square meters. The company was founded in 1969 and is based in Gothenburg, Sweden.
